query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, awayModelSpread, modelTotal, modelAwayML, modelHomeML, spreadEdge, totalEdge, publishedModel, publishedToFeed FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND sport = 'NCAAM' AND (awayTeam = 'tcu' OR homeTeam = 'ohio_st') LIMIT 5;
